extraction.one_line_summary: SKJELMOSE attacked final 500m to win stage and take yellow jersey after EVENEPOEL's move at 6.5km isolated race leader KÜNG.
tactical_patterns: EVENEPOEL attacking at 6.5km remaining immediately distanced defending race leader KÜNG, revealing yellow jersey vulnerability on sustained climbs.
SKJELMOSE positioned in EVENEPOEL's immediate chase group rather than initiating, then counterattacked inside final kilometer when GALL was caught.
KNOX pacing through 6.5km mark before EVENEPOEL's move suggests Soudal Quick-Step primed climb specifically for Remco's acceleration point.

rider_signals.SKJELMOSE Mattias: positive: won from second group by outsprinting GALL in final 500m after positioning perfectly in chase behind EVENEPOEL
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: neutral: forced race selection at 6.5km but caught by AYUSO group, ultimately lost 12 seconds to winner despite making decisive move
rider_signals.GALL Felix: positive: solo move nearly succeeded, only caught inside final kilometer, showing first-year pro near-miss for WorldTour stage win
rider_signals.AYUSO Juan: positive: led chase group that reeled in EVENEPOEL and GALL, finished third at 12 seconds demonstrating superior pacing judgment
rider_signals.KÜNG Stefan: negative: dropped immediately when EVENEPOEL attacked at 6.5km, losing yellow jersey on 10km climb despite controlling early gradients
rider_signals.LUTSENKO Alexey: negative: distanced early on final climb when CATTANEO set pace, unexpectedly poor form for climber of his caliber
rider_signals.KNOX James: positive: paced EVENEPOEL to launch point at 6.5km, demonstrating Soudal's tactical prep for specific attack location
rider_signals.ZUKOWSKY Nickolas: positive: second in KOM sprint to secure polka dot jersey regardless of summit finish outcome, smart defensive riding
